system.powerDescription: Once per rest, you may snap one of the leylines connected to the local Sin entirely, temporarily severing its power. By calling out one of its Domains, you may negate that Domain and any of its effects (such as afflictions or creatures) until the end of the scene. If performed in a conflict scene, has lasts for one round. You must call out a Domain the Sin actually has; if you claim an incorrect Domain, you expend the Psych Burst for no benefit.
